Page 1 of 2
Year of Change Sales Script
Step 1: Use the Abandon Hope Sale to get commitment on a 12-month
membership. (Halfway Meeting)
Step 2: At your next meeting, use this script to convert that 12-month commitment
into a prepaid program. (Weigh Out)
Hey NAME how’s everything going so far?
Hey!
I first want to say congrats on the progress you’ve made with the _Challenge_.
Thanks.
So, it looks like you lost _Weight Lost_ pounds and _Body Fat % Lost_ body fat
percentage…. That’s so cool, I bet you feel great!
Yes, I do!
Awesome, so now what goals are you ready to attack now?
[Their new goals.]
If you stay consistent, you’ll reach those goals without a doubt, especially if you’re on
the year of change program… here let me explain a little more about what that is…
So, the year of change program is something we designed to help our members
reach long-term goals within a year’s time frame. In addition to the membership
you’ve already signed up for, you’ll be getting:
• Our 42-Day Detox Program (which is like another 6 Week Challenge for Free!)
[Replace the challenges for what they completes/are moving to.]
• A long-term goal setting and reaching appointment with our accountability coach.
• A spot on the Year of Change clipboard by the scale where we’ll track your monthly
results.
• And you’ll be added to the Year Of Change Facebook Accountability group where we
have everyone else who set long term goals can help keep each other accountable!
That’s amazing! How does it work?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Page 2 of 2
Year of Change Sales Script
Yeah, it’s really cool and super simple to get signed up. Since you’re already signed
up for a 12-month membership with us, all you have to do is let me know that one,
you want into the program and two, that you’re able to prepay for the next 10
months of your membership with us….. and we’ll give you the last two months for
free.
1 month for making a commitment to us, and 1 month for making a commitment to
yourself. So, it’d be like changing your current rate of _$Current Rate per
month/week/etc._ to _$New Rate Per Month/Week/etc._. Is that cool?
Wow that really cool. How much would that be?
12 months with us would normally be _$Total Cost Per Year_, but with this program
it’s only _$Your Year of Change Rate_.
If you want, we can just use the card you have on file and get rid of your weekly
payments? Sound like a plan?
Sure!
Notes:
• Make sure to do the math beforehand. If they get/applied a challenge credit
don’t forget about adding that in.
• If you got a 12-month commitment during the initial orientation, this can be
pitched at the halfway.
• Try not to go for this in the same meeting as the 12-month commitment.
Reduces the chances and we need a smaller commitment first. If they signed
a 12-month contract, they will show up to weigh outs so you WILL have the
chance. Be patient.
• Upon closing the sale have them fill out the contract and then right away
schedule the appointment with the accountability coach, add their name to
the clipboard, add them to the FB Group, and give them the 42-Day Detox or
6 Week Challenge Member’s Portal (whichever they haven’t gotten yet) this
greatly reduces the chance of back-outs since you’ve already delivered what
you promised.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
